calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Apr-26-2018 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: Francisco Gutierrez, Esq., appeared on behalf of Appellant/Defendant Jessica Kang, also present.
Respondent/Plaintiff Shamsheer Shergill appeared on her own behalf.
This cause comes on regularly for trial de novo. All parties are sworn. Parties stipulated to a Judge Pro Tem.
Appellant/Defendant files a trial brief.
Respondent/Plaintiff Shamsheer Shergill testifies on her own behalf.
Appellant/Defendant Jessica Kang and Francisco Gutierrez testify on behalf of Jessica Kang.
The following documentary evidence is introduced:
Appellant's Exhibit 1 - Group of color photographs of apartment.
After hearing and considering the testimony and evidence presented, Judgment is ordered in favor of Respondent/Plaintiff Shamsheer Shergill and against Appellant/Defendant Jessica Kang in principal amount of $5,500, costs $48.00, for a total Judgment of $5,548.00. Respondent Shamsheer Shergill to retain ownership of property listed in Attachment A to Appellant Jessica Kang's Trial Brief.
Judgment on appeal is final and case is remanded back to Small Claims Court.
Appellant's exhibits returned to the submitting party.
Dept. 525; Judge Pro Tem: Robert Stumpf; Clerk: J. Bertelsen; Not reported.
